notes: SHIP v1.14.278 - COMMAND COLUMN DESKTOP UNIFORM (CSS-only, desktop-only). Per HANDOFF-CMD-DESKTOP-UNIFORM-278. Adds one @media (min-width:980px) block AFTER the #pg-cmd base rules (inserted after the 1400px block, ~L9738) so equal-specificity selectors win on source order - the v1.14.164 rule at L8749 was defeated because the base 'margin:0 16px 14px' shorthand re-set margin-left/right and killed its auto-centering (max-width survived, centering did not). New block caps all NINE command rows (statusrow/lens/stats/nba/ask/trow/sig-h/sigrow/sig-empty) to max-width:1080px + margin auto, and zeroes L/R padding on the padding group (statusrow/stats/trow) so children land on the same edge as the margin group borders. DEVIATION FROM SPEC (folded in, owner-approved): spec classed .sig-h as margin-based, but live .sig-h (L9164) is padding-based (padding:2px 16px 8px); added #pg-cmd .sig-h L/R padding-zero so the OPS SIGNAL label lands flush at the column edge like the mockup (its 10px flex gap left untouched, NOT folded into the gap:16px group). PHONE PROVABLY UNCHANGED: every rule is inside @media(min-width:980px); nothing below 980 touched. Verified before ship that the later body.rd #pg-cmd material rules (ask L11406 / nba L11443 / sigrow L11720 / lens L11740, the GLASS SKIN layer) set only border/background/box-shadow - no margin/max-width - so they do not defeat the centering even at higher specificity. No markup, no JS, no assets, no !important. ?legacy=1 unaffected. Gates: node --check clean; CSS braces balanced (+4/+4, whole-file even); CRLF preserved (0 bare LF, +52 lines); three-stamp .277->.278. NOTE stacked on unverified .277 per owner 'go' (batch-verify: 2 low-risk ships, well under the 6-cap). John iPhone gate: (1) PHONE portrait+landscape IDENTICAL to .277 - any diff = revert; (2) DESKTOP all nine rows share one left+one right edge top-to-bottom (RACKS/BLOCKERS/DEPLOYS flush with COMMAND LENS; OPS SIGNAL header+row on the column; Ask spans full 1080; pill row + tile row no longer indented); (3) drag a window through 980 both ways - clean handoff, no jump.
